ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Solar Radiation, Wind Speed, Temperature, Ozone) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sensor calibration */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation level */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "ozone_level" REAL /* Ozone level */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* PM2.5 level */,
  "pm10" REAL /* PM10 level */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "quality_indicator" TEXT /* Quality indicator of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "data_source_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "upload_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the upload */,
  "upload_description" TEXT /* Description of the upload (e.g., batch upload, manual entry) */,
  "upload_method" TEXT /* Method of upload */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., sensor calibration, data validation) */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quality check */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check or issues found */,
  "quality_check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of quality checks */,
  "next_check_due" TEXT /* Date of the next quality check */,
  "quality_check_performed_by" TEXT /* Who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_quality_check_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("quality_check_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report generation */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "viz_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "generation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visualization generation */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "viz_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization */,
  "visualization_view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the visualization has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
